lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੀ ਆਰਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਕੀ ਸੂਖ ਮੰਗਲ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaddee aarajaa har gobind kee sookh mangal kaliaan beechaariaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He has blessed Hargobind with long life, and taken care of my comfort, happiness and well-being. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣ ਤ੍ਰਿਣ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਏ ਸਗਲੇ ਜੀਅ ਸਾਧਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: van trin tribhavan hariaa hoe sagale jeea saadhaariaa |
lines.english: The forests, meadows and the three worlds have blossomed forth in greenery; He gives His Support to all beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਇਛੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਫਲ ਪਾਏ ਪੂਰਨ ਇਛ ਪੁਜਾਰਿਆ ॥੨॥੫॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: man ichhe naanak fal paae pooran ichh pujaariaa |2|5|23|
lines.english: Nanak has obtained the fruits of his mind's desires; his desires are totally fulfilled. ||2||5||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਊਪਰਿ ਹੋਵਤ ਦਇਆਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis aoopar hovat deaal |
lines.english: One who is blessed by the Lord's Mercy,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਕਾਟੈ ਸੋ ਕਾਲੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har simarat kaattai so kaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: passes his time in contemplative meditation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਾਚੈ ਸਾਧ ਰਵਾਲ ॥੨॥੬॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: naanak jaachai saadh ravaal |2|6|24|
lines.english: Nanak begs for the dust of the feet of the Holy. ||2||6||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਤ ਤੂਟੈ ਜਮ ਜਾਲੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gun gaavat toottai jam jaal |1|
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, the noose of death is cut away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਭਜੀਐ ਗੋਪਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang bhajeeai gopaal |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, meditate, and vibrate upon the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: aape satigur aape pratipaal |
lines.english: He Himself is the True Guru, and He Himself is the Cherisher.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਿੰਚਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: man meh sinchahu har har naam |
lines.english: Irrigate your mind with the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin keeratan har gun gaam |1|
lines.english: Night and day, sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਾਨਹੁ ਨੇਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar prabh jaanahu nere |1| rahaau |
lines.english: that twenty-four hours a day, God will seem near to you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aisee preet karahu man mere |
lines.english: Enshrine such love, O my mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਭਾਗ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jaa ke niramal bhaag |
lines.english: Says Nanak, one who has such immaculate destiny

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨੀ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗ ॥੨॥੭॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: har charanee taa kaa man laag |2|7|25|
lines.english: - his mind is attached to the Lord's Feet. ||2||7||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਦ ਪਈ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਘਰੁ ਆਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: need pee sukh sehaj ghar aaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I sleep in peace; peaceful poise has come to my home. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗੁ ਗਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: rog geaa prabh aap gavaaeaa |
lines.english: The disease is gone; God Himself took it away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਜਿ ਰਜਿ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਖਾਵਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: raj raj bhojan khaavahu mere bhaaee |
lines.english: Eat to your fill, O my Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਅਪਨੇ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਾਈ ॥੨॥੮॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: jin apane naam kee paij rakhaaee |2|8|26|
lines.english: who has preserved the honor of His Name. ||2||8||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਰਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak gur poore saranaaee |
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of the Perfect Guru,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦ ਮਾਹਿ ਧਿਆਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: amrit naam rid maeh dhiaaee |1|
lines.english: Meditate on the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord, within your heart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਰਿ ਦੀਨੇ ਅਸਥਿਰ ਘਰ ਬਾਰ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kar deene asathir ghar baar | rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru has protected my hearth and home, and made them permanent. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਸਰਨਾਈ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਖੰਡ ਅਪਾਰ ॥੨॥੯॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: naanak daas taa kee saranaaee jaa ko sabad akhandd apaar |2|9|27|
lines.english: Slave Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of God; the Word of His Shabad is unbreakable and infinite. ||2||9||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਨਿੰਦ ਕਰੈ ਇਨ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਨ ਕੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਹੀ ਮਾਰੈ ਕਰਤਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo jo nind karai in grihan kee tis aagai hee maarai karataar |1|
lines.english: Whoever slanders these homes, is pre-destined by the Creator Lord to be destroyed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਪ ਸੰਤਾਪ ਸਗਲੇ ਗਏ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਤੇ ਰੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: taap santaap sagale ge binase te rog |
lines.english: The fever and sickness are gone, and the diseases are all dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਮੰਡਲੀ ਤੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਆਰੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: sarab sukhaa teree manddalee teraa man tan aarog |
lines.english: All joys have entered your world, and your mind and body are free of disease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਤੂ ਬਖਸਿਆ ਸੰਤਨ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham too bakhasiaa santan ras bhog | rahaau |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God has forgiven you, so enjoy the happiness of the Saints. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਬਸਹੁ ਘਰ ਦੇਸ ਮਹਿ ਇਹ ਭਲੇ ਸੰਜੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: aae basahu ghar des meh ih bhale sanjog |
lines.english: So come, and dwell in your home and native land; this is such a blessed and auspicious occasion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਨਿਤ ਰਾਮ ਕੇ ਇਹ ਅਵਖਦ ਜੋਗ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gun gaavahu nit raam ke ih avakhad jog |1|
lines.english: So chant continuously the Glorious Praises of the Lord; this is the only potent medicine. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਹੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਚਾਲਹੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਜੰਜਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: kaahoo sang na chaalahee maaeaa janjaal |
lines.english: The entanglements of Maya do not go along with anyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ਭਏ ਲਹਿ ਗਏ ਬਿਓਗ ॥੨॥੧੦॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh suprasan bhe leh ge biog |2|10|28|
lines.english: O Nanak, God is totally pleased with you; your time of separation has come to an end. ||2||10||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੰਬੁਧਿ ਕਉ ਬਿਨਸਨਾ ਇਹ ਧੁਰ ਕੀ ਢਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: ahanbudh kau binasanaa ih dhur kee dtaal |
lines.english: Pride goes before the fall - this is a primal law.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਠਿ ਸਿਧਾਰੇ ਛਤ੍ਰਪਤਿ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਖਿਆਲ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aootth sidhaare chhatrapat santan kai khiaal | rahaau |
lines.english: Even kings and rulers must arise and depart, according to the wisdom of the Saints. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਬਚਨ ਸਾਧੂ ਕਹਹਿ ਨਿਤ ਜਪਹਿ ਗੁਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: sat bachan saadhoo kaheh nit japeh gupaal |
lines.english: The Holy Saints chant Words of Truth; they meditate continually on the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਜਨਮਹਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਬਿਕਰਾਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bahu jonee janameh mareh bikhiaa bikaraal |1|
lines.english: Those who practice corruption and sin, are born into countless incarnations, only to die again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਰੰਗ ਲਾਲ ॥੨॥੧੧॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: simar simar naanak tare har ke rang laal |2|11|29|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance, O Nanak, those who are imbued with the color of the Lord's Love are carried across. ||2||11||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਹਾਈ ਸੰਗਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਗੁਣ ਚੀਨ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sahaaee sang prabh amrit gun cheen | rahaau |
lines.english: God is always my Helper and Companion; I contemplate His Ambrosial Virtues. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਅਨੰਦ ਸੂਖ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਨ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj samaadh anand sookh poore gur deen |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has blessed me with celestial Samaadhi, bliss and peace.
